segments.text: Thank you for calling. You have reached us outside of our normal office hours. If this is a medical emergency
please hang up in dial 911. You are speaking with Sarah, a virtual assistant on a recorded line.
Our normal office hours are Monday through Friday from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. How can I help you today?
Yes, I got up this morning and I had blood in my urine.
So I was wondering if I have to get the doctor's permission to go get a cup at one of the walk-ins.
I understand you notice blood in your urine this morning and are wondering if you need
your doctor's permission to provide a urine sample at a walk-in clinic.
Because you are experiencing blood in your urine, I want to make sure you are not having
any severe symptoms.
Are you experiencing any severe pain, fever, difficulty urinating or any other concerning
symptoms right now?
Just some burning when I urinate.
Thank you for letting me know.
Just to be sure, are you experiencing any severe pain, fever, nausea, vomiting, or difficulty
passing urine at this time?
Thank you for clarifying.
Since you are not experiencing severe symptoms, I can take a message for your provider so
they can follow up with you during the next business day.
May I have your first name, please?
Um, got it.
Your first name is...is that spelling?
Thank you.
And what is your last name?
Thank you.
Just to confirm, is your last name spelling?
Perfect.
I have your last name what is your date of birth 8 16 49 just to confirm your date
of birth is August 16th 1949 is that correct yes thank you is this number
the best number to reach you yes thank you can you tell me which provider you
usually see Dr. Carney thank you Dr. Carney is your provider could you please
briefly describe the reason for your call so I can include it in the message
for your provider? I think that I have a urinary infection because there's blood in my urine.
Thank you for explaining. What is a good time for your provider or a nurse to call you back
during our office hours? Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.? Anytime is fine. I have all
the details. I will send a message to your provider so they can follow up with you during
the next business day. Thank you. You are welcome. Is there anything else I can help
you with today? No, that's it. Thank you. Thank you again for calling. Have a good day.
